title: clematis puberula var. subsericea
intro: Clematis puberula var. subsericea, also known as the silky clematis, is a flowering plant species that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Clematis puberula var. subsericea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to treat various ailments, and its roots and stems are also used in folk medicine to make poultices and salves.
